name: project-memory-runtime
description: Local-first lifecycle memory runtime for coding agents

scripts.test: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm --filter @slicenferqin/project-memory-runtime-core test && pnpm --filter @slicenferqin/project-memoryctl test
scripts.lint: pnpm exec eslint packages/runtime/src packages/runtime/tests tools/benchmarks tools/memoryctl --max-warnings=0
